others.action_text: User states intent to write a paper on evaluating human–AI collaboration
User requests to write one paragraph collaboratively
Assistant proposes starting by either drafting a paragraph or asking how the user wants to approach the collaboration
Assistant decides to engage the user in the process rather than just dumping a full paragraph
Assistant offers a positive opening remark about the topic
Assistant asks clarifying questions about the domain focus and the paragraph's intended role
Assistant offers to draft a solid opening paragraph for the user to shape if they prefer
